old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-htto","title":"[spec-compliance] gateway RPL root prefix sets incomplete DODAG ID","description":"In lichen/apps/gateway/src/rpl_root.c:56-58 and main.c changes from f5b226b12: lichen_rpl_root_set_prefix only memcpy 8 bytes from prefix to dodag.dodag_id when len\u003e=64. Per spec/04-network.md:6.1, DODAGID must be full 128-bit address (root link-local or ULA with IID). Also init sets prefix_len=64 hard-coded while set_prefix allows variable. Violates MUST for correct RPL DIO advertisement and root identification (RFC 6550 §3.2, LICHEN 8.2). Test vectors in test/vectors/rpl_messages.json may fail.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-22T22:52:27.343519216Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:52:27.343519216Z"}
